title: resource-template model defines reusable service catalog blueprints
content:
# resource-template model defines reusable service catalog blueprints

`powerhouse/resource-template` defines the base configuration that ServiceOfferings build on. Templates provide the service catalog structure without pricing.

## State Shape

```graphql
type ResourceTemplateState {
    id: PHID!
    operatorId: PHID!              # → BuilderProfile (external)
    title: String!
    summary: String!
    status: TemplateStatus!        # DRAFT | COMING_SOON | ACTIVE | DEPRECATED
    targetAudiences: [TargetAudience!]!
    setupServices: [String!]!
    recurringServices: [String!]!
    facetTargets: [FacetTarget!]!
    services: [Service!]!
    optionGroups: [OptionGroup!]!
    faqFields: [FaqField!]
    contentSections: [ContentSection!]!
}
```

## Modules (7)

| Module | Operations | Purpose |
|--------|-----------|---------|
| template-management | 4 | Info, status, operator, ID |
| audience-management | 2 | Add/remove target audiences |
| facet-targeting | 4 | Set/remove facet targets, add/remove options |
| service-category-management | 2 | Set setup/recurring service lists |
| service-management | 5 | Service CRUD, facet bindings |
| option-group-management | 3 | Option group CRUD |
| content-section-management | 3+3 | Content sections + FAQ CRUD |

## Key References

- `operatorId: PHID` → BuilderProfile (external)
- `Service.parentServiceId: OID` → Service (self-referencing hierarchy)
- `Service.optionGroupId: OID` → OptionGroup
- `facetBindings.facetType: PHID` → Facet (this project)
- ServiceOffering.`resourceTemplateId` → references this model

---

description: 28 operations across 7 modules — defines base configuration for resources including services, option groups, facet targeting, FAQs, and content sections
